Search that finds — docs-site relevance bundle

Branch feat/docs-search-relevance · playground artifact · 2026-07-17

Ranking rules

RuleBehavior
Per-property boostsTitle ×5 > description ×2 (lightweight index); Orama path keeps advanced title/heading weighting + boost.content 1.5.
Doc-type weightingguide ×1.35 · concept ×1.3 · cookbook ×1.25 · other ×1.0 · skill/agent/hook ref ×0.9 · reference ×0.8. Type derived from URL prefix (/docs/reference/… = reference).
Exact-title floorQuery exactly (+2000) or prefix (+1000) matching a title overrides type weight — commit keeps the /ork:commit reference page in the top 3.
Typo toleranceEdit distance 1 (incl. transpositions), only for queries ≥ 4 chars. Orama tolerance gated the same way.
Synonymsagent↔subagent · hook↔event · command↔cmd↔slash-command · MCP↔server · playground↔lab · composition↔pipeline · write↔create↔author · install↔setup · docs↔documentation. Synonym hits score ×0.5.
Zero-result rescue"Did you mean" = closest titles by per-token edit distance + browse links. Beacon (query, ≤80 chars) via existing /api/analytics proxy.
Dialog UXTop results (top 3) then grouped sections GuidesConceptsSkillsAgentsHooksOther max 4/group; facet chips All/Guides/Skills/Agents/Hooks above results; keyboard nav unchanged (flat item array).

Golden queries (24 tests, all green)

QueryExpected in top-3Case
commit/docs/skills/spotlights/commit · /docs/reference/skills/commitexact-title floor
memory/docs/reference/skills/memory · /docs/skills/spotlights/memoryexact-title floor
worktree/docs/reference/hooks/worktree-createprefix floor (camel-case)
hooks/docs/hooks/overviewconcept > reference
how do I write a skill/docs/skills/writing-skillsstopwords + write→create
adopt claude code release/docs/guides/cc-adoptionguide weighting
triage/docs/showcase/lab/triage-boardlab page
lab/docs/showcase/labexact title ("The Lab")
installation · hook debugging · release channels · graph memory · changelogtheir exact-title pagesexact/prefix floor
commt · memroy · installtioncommit / memory / installation pagestypo tolerance
subagent · playground · cmdagents overview / The Lab / command pagessynonyms
xyzzyq blorp · qwzk vprt≥1 "did you mean" suggestionzero-result rescue

Suite: docs/site/__tests__/search-golden.test.ts — runs against the regenerated real index via the shipped searchDocs() path; ranking primitives shared with /api/search through lib/search-relevance.ts.
